DP.263.0000:
The locked doors only open with
a special key.\f
Now, if I was a comedy relief sort
of bad guy, I’d tell you...\f
But I really don’t know!
DP.263.0001:
The door is locked.
A special key is needed.
DP.263.0002:
The door is locked.
A special key is needed.\f
Use the Galactic Key?
DP.263.0004:
The Team Galactic credo!
Everything belongs to Team Galactic!\f
Look beyond the world--space will
become Team Galactic’s!
